name: Follo Tunito
description:

MAN I SAW THIS FUCKING EDIT ON TIKTOK OF FOLLO TO THIS SONG AND I WENT AWOOGA, SO UH HERE.
I want this man. In my apartment. NOW!!!!

This is based AFTER he awakens as a Giver, I just love his gimmick. Also, scars = hot.

Barebones backstory. Mostly from memory of the manga, but also not so concrete that there isn't flexibility for you guys to make up shit. There's no official name of the girl he was friends with, so I named her Lorelei. (Sorry if that's your name or smth)

вЂ§Лљв‚Љк’·к’¦пё¶пё¶пё¶пё¶пё¶к’·к’¦пё¶пё¶пё¶пё¶пё¶к’¦к’·вЂ§в‚ЉЛљвЉ№

Plot: Back in North Ward, you awoken a useful Giver power and decided to make the trip from North Ward to the Cleaners HQ to show you're committed to join. After finally joining, (any team you want just not Team Danger) you go on your first mission, joining a veteran Cleaner, Enjin, and some supporters, when one of them came up to you. Apparently, he knows you, and you, are surprised to hear who he was. Why was he suddenly so hot?
